notes: Add overflow: hidden to .proj-table tbody th. Diagnostic showed cell box ends exactly at 227.4px where May TD starts (zero gap), yet text visually appeared to overlap. This is glyph anti-aliasing / font kerning extending 1-2px past the box boundary at certain zoom levels. overflow: hidden on the cell itself clips any such spillover. Vertical wrapping still works (cell grows to accommodate multiple lines, hidden only clips horizontally).
